case_title: DAMIAN D JONES VS. PARED, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DAMIAN D. JONES. DEFENDANT PARED,INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILFRED PACIO, CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, DAMIAN D AKA   GREGGORY D. JOHNSON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,144.04 FILED BY JONES, DAMIAN D AKA   GREGGORY D. JOHNSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARED, INC. ( DELAWARE CORPORATION ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, DAMIAN D AKA   GREGGORY D. JOHNSON
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/24/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD"
